programme.desc: Bellator MMA Women’s Featherweight World Champion Cris Cyborg puts her belt on the line against Leslie 'The Peacemaker' Smith. Former Bantamweight World Champion Darrion 'The Wolf' Caldwell makes his return in a showdown with Leandro 'Alter' Higo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Welterweight World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima puts his belt on the line against undefeated Ukrainian Yaroslav 'Dynamo' Amo-sov. Legendary knockout artist Paul 'Semtex' Daley collides with Jason 'The Ass Kicking Machine' Jackson.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Trad-wife Estee talks about why she gave up a career to be a full-time housewife and submit to her husband. She confronts critics who say she’s betraying feminism and setting women back decades.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil reveals a serious threat to the future of America, one that could threaten every aspect of its infrastructure, leaving families and businesses helpless.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: A Dr Phil exclusive: A one hour interview with Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, unedited, commercial-free from Israel, at perhaps the most critical time in the conflict.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Two mothers who struggle with obesity use the GLP-1 shot to lose weight and now say they want their children to do the same.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Trigger Warnings do not work, yet trigger warnings, originally used for people suffering from PTSD, are now being used everywhere for everything.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: The latest report by the CDC found 488 people died from alcohol related issues every day during the pandemic, reporting a surge in consumption that hadn’t been seen in 50 years. But many claim the problem is not getting better.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Student athletes say they were hazed, physically & sexually assaulted by their teammates inside the locker rooms. They blame the coaches and the schools for not punishing those responsible and for shaming them. But Dr. Phil blames someone else.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: College campuses, including elite institutions, are seeing protests by pro-Hamas groups and outside agitators. There's a growing hate movement targeting Jews, Israel, and America, challenging our culture and principles.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Is there a wave of migrant crime? High-profile news stories have become lighting rods highlighting the issues with sanctuary cities and policies across America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil is joined by NYPD Chief of Patrol John Chell to discuss concerns of rise in migrant crime as recent headlining news has sparked national debate on the safety of our communities across America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil goes inside NYPD headquarters where officers are working around the clock to keep the city safe. Ride a-long with NYPD as they patrol the city's most dangerous streets, showing us first-hand the challenges they're up against.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: When it comes to the future America’s workforce, many business owners claim the country is in serious trouble due to many young adults having a lazy and poor work ethic. But these young adults claim they are not lazy, they are just misunderstood.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Almost 75% of people don't like their neighbors citing some of the following reasons: 'odd vibes', 'too loud', or 'flat-out rude'. Dr. Phil sorts out this unusual feud: Iguanas wreak havoc in Florida and the feud with the neighbor who feeds them!

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil confronts some of America's leading issues from the border crisis to fentanyl to the homelessness epidemic. He hears from Americans grappling with these challenges.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny confuses Mrs. Drysdale's forays into astrology with the practice of black magic. An intended gift for Ellie Mae from Mr. Drysdale only adds to the confusion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is anxious to become a new "Double Naught" spy and Mr. Drysdale gives him his own office. A bank robber hopes to con an unwitting Jethro into helping him get into the bank vault.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Lucas Sebastian, a billionaire entrepreneur, wants Jed to invest in his new venture, undersea farming.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale is unhappy with Dr. Clyburn's treatment of his cold the Clampetts hear about it. Granny decides it's time to set up practice and enlists the rest of her family to help. She also claims a cure for the common cold.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The world's richest woman wants to buy the Clampett mansion and will stop at nothing to get it. Will Jed finally sell?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Granny hears the Drysdales are at a horse show, she declares she wants good trotter so she can ride it to the market. When Mr. Drysdale buys a racer along with a buggy, Granny decides she wants to be the driver at the track.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters an ostrich at the Drysdales and believe it's a giant chicken. She decides it got into her "medicinal tonic" and that's why it's so big. She tries to apply the idea to her vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts believe resuming his courtship of Elly is why Sonny Drysdale returns. His stepfather arranges a job as a beauty product salesman and his sixth stop at the Clampetts is where his merchandise is mistaken as courting gifts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed thinks Granny needs help in cleaning the mansion, but she believes it's because he wants to put her in a retirement home, so Granny is ready to head to the hills with her money, which Mr. Drysdale is desperate to avoid.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is bent on becoming an astronaut but gets sidetracked into teaming up with Miss Jane to become a folk singer. Along the way, Jethro invents a new musical device he dubs the Bodine o' phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale, at first irate that beautiful actress Bergstrom is kept on an expensive stipend without making a film, is smitten at first sight and so places the actress in the Clampett home to learn backwoods accents and ways for a movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro becomes a Hugh Hefner wannabe when he discovers some Playpen magazines in Mr. Drysdale's garage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny remains eager to get Elly to the altar and decides Professor Biddle, Miss Jane's friend, will do. Mr. Drysdale blackmails Dash into asking the Clampett lass for a date. The meek birdwatcher and the handsome actor are soon at odds.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny despairs of Elly Mae ever finding a husband and decides to promote her non-existent cooking skills. She is entered into a TV show cook-off, but nothing she fixes is edible.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Image seems to be everything at the gang's five-year high-school reunion, where Valerie creates new personas for herself and David, while Andrea Zuckerman tries to hang on to her old one.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly finds it impossible to trust Brandon as he works late every night for several weeks. Noah entertains Gwyneth, a longtime friend. David becomes extremely jumpy after being robbed at an ATM.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Kelly try to help a Bosnian refugee find his wife; Donna puts on a fashion show; Gwyneth takes a page from Valerie's book after admitting feelings for Noah; Steve learns Sarah is married.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: After learning that the clinic may lose funding, Kelly asks Brandon to write a story to generate publicity. David believes that Valerie killed her father in self-defense and should move on.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Abby announces that she and Carl are planning to elope in Las Vegas, and asks Val to be her maid of honor. Kelly begs Val to let her tag along on the trip because she believes that Brandon is seeing someone else.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Carl decides to annul his marriage to Abby because he believes that he has a future with Valerie. Kelly notices that a store is for lease and decides that she and Donna should open a boutique.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon announces that he has accepted a job with the Washington bureau of the New York Chronicle. Kelly and Donna prepare to open their store, Now Wear This. Valerie seeks legal advice from Matt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly decides to help Leah and her daughter skip town and assume a new identity. Valerie elects to throw a massive rave as a farewell party before turning herself in to the police.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: As Kelly and Valerie pack Brandon's belongings for shipment, Kelly discovers a letter in which Val advised Brandon not to marry her. She turns everyone against Val and gets them to boycott her Thanksgiving gathering.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: David is arrested for statutory rape and gets suspended from his radio show. Steve bristles at the news that his mother is dating her much younger co-star. Kelly's reaction to Dylan's return worries Matt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly grows angry with Matt when he takes a case defending a tobacco company. Donna agrees to let a troubled fifteen-year-old girl buy a dress on layaway. Dylan takes his bullet-riddled Porsche out of storage.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylan takes Kelly to Mexico for a day and buys her a gift, but Kelly rejects him to focus on her relationship with Matt. Dylan soon takes Gina to Mexico and buys her the same gift.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dissatisfied customers take Steve to court, and wind up on TV; Gina continues to care for Dylan, who is arrested; Donna and Noah struggle to find a place to be alone; David has to back up his lie to Gertrude; Kelly second-guesses herself with Matt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Lauren moves into the Walsh house; Steve's idea for his paper leads to an alert about a potential health problem; Donna agrees to pose as David's girlfriend at a business function; Gina worries she can't keep pace with Dylan.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Samantha schemes to help Martin and Smitty reconcile. Jacob solves a mystery. Leslie investigates a peculiar correspondence.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Eva's frustrated by her mother's latest antics. Kat and Tomas do their best to find their rhythm during salsa night. Tyrell and Samantha are blindsided. Chelsea bluntly makes her boundaries clear to Allison.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Ted is thrown for a loop by Nicole's latest move. Naomi preps a nervous June for a momentous meeting. Leslie receives a blast from the past at her doorstep. Anita and Vernon comfort their daughter.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Andre and his uncle discuss their relationship woes while Vanessa helps Nicole and Dani prop each other up. Ashley and Madison deal with a major medical crisis.The Articulettes are asked to plan for their future now that they've reconciled with their past

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Leslie learns her luck may have just changed; Doug doles out advice for Ted and some critical information to Jacob; and Ashley calls on Shanice to help Derek.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Eva has a stunning revelation to share with Tomas; Anita and Leslie go head to head; and Andre rushes to the hospital after hearing about Derek, and is surprised by Ashley's reaction to seeing him.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Nicole has a major relationship update to tell Kat; Vanessa meets with a new client who has lofty demands; Vernon calls Bill for help, but Bill has some demands that need to be met first; and Dani dishes out some conditions of her own to Andre.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una mujer en una pequeña ciudad de Florida, habitada enteramente por delincuentes sexuales, La UAC se enfrenta a una comunidad repleta de sospechosos. Además, Lewis tiene una oportunidad profesional que puede llevarla lejos de la UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un agente compañero es asesinado, el equipo de NCIS se dirige al desierto para localizar a una mujer que podría tener la respuesta al misterio del asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La muerte de un boxeador lleva a Vance a pedir prestado al equipo de NCIS para comenzar a investigar el caso, mientras Gibbs indaga en el pasado de Vance.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un niño descubre un arma con la que alguien fue asesinado, toda la familia termina bajo investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs tiene que dejar a un lado sus sentimientos personales y trabajar con Trent Kort, quien regresa para rastrear a un criminal peligroso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El peor de los escenarios
programme.desc: Frank se pone en alerta máxima cuando una amenaza a la ciudad de Nueva York puede ser inminente luego de un ataque terrorista en el Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres empleados de restaurantes mueren en un robo/homicidio en Las Vegas, Nevada, la UAC busca pistas en un caso cerrado que sucedió en la ciudad hace seis años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga incidentes de cadáveres que son incorporados en el macabro arte del graffiti en Detroit, sospechan que un escurridizo, pero notorio artista callejero podría ser el sospechoso.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress call at a local tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are left to solve the crime after signs of an apparent stabbing. A man loiters in a private park. A driver insists that the car is his - even though he needs a screwdriver to start the ignition and the plates are stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist on a call regarding a fight at a local residence. On a felony stop a juvenile male with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Our CSIs attempt to determine there was foul play in a housewife's fall down the stairs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A middle of the night break-in in a suburban home on the edge of the Vegas desert reveals a body dump.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A family of four is brutally murdered in their own home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI determines a young mother's suicide was actually foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a wild police chase through the streets of a Las Vegas Latino ghetto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Evidence points to Sofia as the shooter who accidentally shot another officer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving night, a man is found dead in a dumpster behind a restaurant.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A widowed mother's six-year-old son is reported kidnapped from a local park.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investigates the murder of a man who was covered in hair from head to toe and shot in the heart with a silver bullet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is brought into the world of tweakers and methamphetamines.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs enter the world of glamorous old Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investigates two deaths, both linked to the same killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom teams up with Lady Heather.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is discovered stuffed into a working chimney of a residential home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La ciencia choca con lo oculto cuando el equipo investiga el caso de una psíquica que predijo su propio asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI entran al mundo de la música rap para investigar la muerte de tres adolescentes asesinados mientras trabajaban para raperos rivales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Resolver el caso de un abogado defensor adinerado asesinado en la boda de su hijo, se ve comprometido cuando todas las pruebas son robadas junto con el auto de Nick.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La evidencia demuestra que las apariencias engañan en el caso de un jugador de alto riesgo y mujeriego, asesinado fuera de un casino después de una noche de juerga.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre acusado de asesinar a su esposa y compañeros de trabajo lidera a los CSI en una persecución salvaje a través de un concurrido casino de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se reúne en torno a uno de los suyos, al recibir un disparo en mientras cumplía su trabajo y es posible que no sobreviva en el final de la sexta temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Grissom guía a un grupo de universitarios en un tour por CSI, los muertos hablan mientras los CSI investigan, cada uno narrando su propio caso

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI investigan de primera mano los entresijos del Cirque du Soleil para determinar qué pudo contribuir a la prematura muerte de una joven bailarina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom se siente fascinado cuando cada detalle de una miniatura es idéntico al de la escena de un crimen real, y se pone manos a la obra para intentar resolver el caso utilizando las pistas proporcionadas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre inocente es brutalmente atacado y golpeado hasta la muerte por lo que parece un monstruo con una capa negra, los CSI son llamados para investigar, sólo para enterarse de que un ataque similar tuvo lugar minutos después.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer muerta aparece colgada de una cruz en el interior de una iglesia, el equipo sigue las pruebas para descubrir un extraño triángulo amoroso que se remonta a los días de instituto de la víctima.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se denuncia la desaparición de dos niños, el principal sospechoso es un conocido delincuente sexual del barrio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de una anciana, Grissom recibe una réplica en miniatura de la escena del crimen; Greg asiste a una vista para determinar su culpabilidad en la muerte accidental de un adolescente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos gemelas idénticas aparecen muertas, las pruebas en ambos casos no demuestran inmediatamente una conexión entre las dos muertes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's ex, and Kyle's mother, resurfaces in Miami as a billionaire's widow who will do anything at all to get her son back.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a woman, the CSIs uncover a meth lab in her apartment and an unscrupulous FBI agent with a secret life of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a murder at a wedding, the clues eventually lead the CSI team to a local strip club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's past comes back to haunt him when Julia has him arrested for murder. The CSI team must investigate to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must act quickly to stop a vigilante who has been on a killing spree, targeting Internet predators.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team will stop at nothing to find who shot Horatio, the evidence leads them to some of the most dangerous people in Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When gasoline gets so expensive that Miami’s residents kill for it, the CSIs come face to face with one of the city’s most sadistic crime rings.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the daughter of Delko's therapist is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must find the killer before Delko's darkest secrets are exposed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A savage double murder in the Everglades pits Horatio and the CSI team against the brute force of Miami's own Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una niña de cinco años es asesinada en un restaurante/área de juegos que atiende a padres e hijos, y Horatio y el equipo deben investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo investigan el asesinato de un stripper encontrado muerto después de una fiesta sexual femenina. La evidencia sugiere que tuvo relaciones sexuales antes de su muerte.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una familia es asesinada en su casa, Horatio y el equipo intentan encontrar al asesino con las pruebas dejadas en el lugar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tres personas son asesinadas a tiros en el centro de Miami durante la hora pico y Horatio y el equipo deben atrapar al asesino rápidamente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran a una profesora de una universidad local colgada de un árbol después de ser torturada. Había sido torturada durante al menos cuatro horas antes de que la ahorcaran.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una niña no identificada cerca de un campo de rehabilitación muy estricto, Horatio y el equipo investigan su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar cuando encuentran a una prostituta muerta a puñaladas metida bajo una cama después de que se limpió el cuerpo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando se revela que una red de laboratorios clandestinos está fabricando drogas mortales, Horatio y Speedle investigan la situación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y Speedle investigan cuando un ladrón y violador ha sido agredido sexualmente y atado con cintas a los pilares de su cama después de que lo mataron por asfixia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo se exponen a radiación mientras investigan un asesinato, lo que los lleva a un abogado ambientalista que se muere de envenenamiento por radiación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar el asesinato de un inmigrante de Europa del Este asesinado a puñaladas en una cabina de espectáculos eróticos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se apresuran para encontrar nuevas pruebas para un juicio en curso por asesinato para evitar la condena de un hombre posiblemente inocente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se suponía que era un viaje encubierto de rutina al incinerador para deshacerse de pruebas de drogas, pero emboscan a los oficiales de policía.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El caso de Horatio de una mujer asesinada se ve comprometido cuando se involucran los agentes federales, que tienen su propio plan a seguir.

programme.desc: When a mounted New York City police officer is shot off his horse, Detective Mac Taylor and the team comb the city for suspects.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The electrocution of a young man on the third rail of the subway leads into the world of an extreme sport where taking risks is part of the game.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Competitive dog owners become the prime suspects in a murder investigation when Detective Mac Taylor examines the death of a dog trainer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigation of a suburban kid found beaten to death in Van Cortland Park leads the CSI team to Tanglewood, home to a group of wannabe gangsters.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover the body of a teenaged boy crammed into a 2’ x 2’ x 2’ box buried in the sand at Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Danny Messer find themselves on the trail of an elusive killer when an expectant bride drops dead on her wedding day.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating a truck-jacking, Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover a body pancaked underneath ten tons of steel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration for the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor descubre el cuerpo de una mujer en Brooklyn Heights, cuando su investigación lo lleva a un asesino en serie.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y Danny Messer van bajo tierra y entran al mundo de los hombres que excavan bajo la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La misión de los detectives Stella Bonasera y Danny Messer de encontrar a un violador brutal se ve obstaculizada, ya que la víctima no recuerda el ataque.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una broma pesada se convierte en un misterio de un asesinato que abarca un siglo cuando un esqueleto colocado en un autobús turístico resulta ser auténtico.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI Investiga cuando el DJ más popular de Nueva York es encontrado muerto minutos antes de ser coronado campeón indiscutible de scratching.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El brutal apuñalamiento de una joven lleva a los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera a Stuyvesant Town, el epicentro de la clase media de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: En una prueba de fe, Mac Taylor asigna a los detectives Danny Messer y Aiden Burn a uno de los casos más difíciles del equipo de CSI hasta ahora.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un robo en Chinatown sale mal cuando asesinan a un guardia de seguridad y el otro dispara por error a un tanque de gasolina y dos de los ladrones se queman vivos.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El pánico sobreviene en la Bolsa Mercantil de Nueva York cuando abandonan un maletín, rastrean su origen hasta un corredor de bolsa que desapareció misteriosamente.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando a un oficial de la policía montada de la ciudad de Nueva York lo tiran de su caballo con un tiro, el detective Mac Taylor y el equipo peinan la ciudad en busca de sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La electrocución de un joven en el tercer riel del metro conduce al mundo de un deporte extremo donde correr riesgos es parte del juego.

programme.desc: Los dueños de perros competidores se convierten en los principales sospechosos de una investigación de asesinato cuando el detective Mac Taylor examina la muerte de un adiestrador de perros.

programme.title: Las Señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Dos hermanas solteronas creen que cometer un robo deja de ser considerado como pecado luego de ir a la confesión.

programme.title: El proceso de las señoritas Vivanco

programme.title: Acá las tortas (Los hijos de los ricos)
programme.desc: Don Chente y Dolores son un matrimonio que dirige una modesta pero exitosa tortería. Cuando sus hijos regresan tras terminar sus estudios en el extranjero, deberán lidiar con sus refinados gustos y constantes solicitudes económicas.

programme.title: Cuenta final

programme.title: Margot en la boda

programme.title: Mátame suavemente
programme.desc: Al rojo vivo, Heather Graham (Boogie Nights) y Joseph Fiennes (Shakespeare in Love) como nunca antes, en esta odisea sexual acerca de los poderes adictivos y mortales de la pasión ilícita. Algo muy bueno puede resultar mortal.

programme.title: Las estafadoras

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate

programme.title: El ojo del observador

programme.title: Piraña 3D
programme.desc: Un terremoto en Arizona abre una fisura en el fondo del lago Havasu, liberando decenas de pirañas prehistóricas que aterrorizan a la ciudad cercana.

programme.title: Especies

programme.title: Un fantasma fastidioso

programme.desc: A un adolescente huérfano le muerde una libélula radioactiva, dándole poderes sobrehumanos en esta parodia de películas como ‘Spider-Man’, ‘X-Men’ y ‘Los cuatro fantásticos’.

programme.desc: El agente charlatán Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) tiene la mira puesta en un gurú, el Dr. Sinja. Cuando aparece un misterioso árbol Bodhi en su patio, Jack se da cuenta de que deberá portarse mejor antes de que caiga la última hoja del árbol, o morirá.

programme.title: Un Guardaespaldas Escolar
programme.desc: Dos estudiantes de secundaria acosados por un matón ponen un anuncio en una revista en busca de un guardaespaldas y reciben respuesta de un veterano vagabundo.

programme.title: Super Hero Movie (LAS)
programme.desc: A un adolescente huérfano le muerde una libélula radioactiva, dándole poderes sobrehumanos en esta parodia de películas como ‘Spider-Man’, ‘X-Men’ y ‘Los cuatro fantásticos’.

programme.desc: El agente charlatán Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) tiene la mira puesta en un gurú, el Dr. Sinja. Cuando aparece un misterioso árbol Bodhi en su patio, Jack se da cuenta de que deberá portarse mejor antes de que caiga la última hoja del árbol, o morirá.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Return of Sabata
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: Adios, Sabata
programme.desc: Under the brutal rule of garrison leader Col. Skimmel, a group of Mexican revolutionaries hire gunslinger Sabata (Yul Brynner) to rob a transport of gold in order to buy weapons. But the Colonel has other plans...taking the gold for himself.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: Archie (Gregory Peck) and his partner, Billy (Desi Arnaz, Jr.) are bandits by trade, staging daring robberies throughout the American frontier. But when their latest heist takes a deadly turn, they are pursued by a ruthless marshal (Jack Warden).

programme.title: Johnny Guitar
programme.desc: Gambling house operator Vienna seeks control of a town as archrival Emma Small sets out to force Vienna out of town. The timely arrival of Johnny Guitar thwarts Emma's dark plans, but doesn't prevent a showdown between the women.

programme.title: Oklahoma! (1955)
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, several farmers, cowboys and a traveling salesman compete for the romantic favors of various local ladies.

programme.title: How to Succeed in Business Without Really Trying (1967)
programme.desc: This hilarious musical stars Robert Morse as a charming and scheming window washer who climbs to the top of the corporate ladder by way of a self-help book.

programme.title: Topkapi
programme.desc: Peter Ustinov won an Oscar for Best Supporting Actor in this lighthearted thriller about five thieves (including Melina Mercouri, Maximilian Schell, and Robert Morley) who undertake an absolutely impossible grand theft in Istanbul.

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco
programme.desc: Elvis heads south of the border, where he’s fired as a boat hand, hired as a lifeguard and singer, admired by local beauties and inspired to jump off a 136-foot cliff. Put another way: he overcomes a fear of heights in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He’s a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: His mother (Angela Lansbury) expects him to climb the corporate ladder. But Elvis would rather wear an aloha shirt than a white collar, so he goes to work as a tour guide. Lucky Elvis: his first customers are a car full of cuties.

programme.title: Barefoot In The Park
programme.desc: Robert Redford is Mister Straight. Jane Fonda is his new wife. As the ecstasy of the honeymoon gives way to the reality of setting up housekeeping in a five-flight walk-up, the harmony of marriage turns to comical discord.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude's grandson and Arthur's granddaughter are discovered playing 'doctor' behind the garage, war is declared between Maude and Arthur over what punishment -- if any -- the boy should be given.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When an important Third Reich official wants to defect, Hogan brings him to Stalag 13 - and convinces Col. Klink that the fugitive is Adolf Hitler in disguise...who is trying to elude assassins by hiding at the camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground, Hogan causes a marital tiff, which, to fix, requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission, Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalter's alert brother-in-law, who enjoys tormenting prisoners.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilot's resistance to interrogation, Hogan brings the man's fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogan's set-up at Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan enlists an attractive agent's help in blackmailing Gen. Burkhalter so Klink won't be punished for the destruction of a newly built radio tower.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un hombre desaparece un año después de haber comenzado una aventura con la esposa de su amigo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los crímenes más descarados del siglo 20. Adolph Coors III, el ejecutivo de Coors Brewing Company, fue secuestrado y retenido para un rescate.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una atractiva joven fue encontrado a una milla de su auto abandonado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el verano de 1986, el cuerpo de Kathleen Lipscomb fue encontrado en una carretera desierta en las afueras de San Antonio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mañana, en una zona desértica en las afueras de Phoenix, un motociclista descubre el cuerpo de una joven mujer. Había sido golpeada, amarrada, estrangulada y posiblemente violada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, cuando un grupo fundamentalista comienza a robar bancos cerca de Spokane, las autoridades saben de inmediato que están tratando con criminales con experiencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Ally Texeira, who has sweet dreams to change the face of the ice cream industry, tries to freeze out The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Long Island's Laura Siano has big plans for big money--the three S's: save, spend and share. But this game also comes with M's: martinis and male models.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A look at the world of the African driver ant, a violent miniature monster which kills every living thing it can pin down and slice up.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A surprising natural history of the Grand Canyon, from dinosaurs to today.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: For thousands of years, downtown LA hid an indiscriminate killer. In one of the most surprising wildlife crime stories in the world, `Natural World' turns forensic detective to solve the mystery and unmask victims and killers.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: The world's biggest beasts have always captured the imagination, but whilst being big can have its advantages, it also comes with sizeable challenges. The Komodo dragon's huge appetite means it must take on prey ten times its weight.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham is out to determine whether the Himalayan Yeti and the Sumatran Orang Pendek exist.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham embarks on a mission to investigate the existence of the mythical giant squid.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham searches for clues related to the existence of the Loch Ness Monster in Scotland. He also visits Australia to learn about a giant lizard called Megalania.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham sets out in search of stories about Bigfoot, a mythical ape-like creature that has been the focus of many fiction novels, movies and documentaries over the years.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scaroth intends to travel back in time to save his own people from destruction.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Meglos plans to steal the ancient and powerful Dodecahedron from Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Posing as the Doctor, Meglos penetrates the underground city of Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Meglos escapes with the Dodecahedron and the Doctor is mistakenly held responsible.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor must prevent Meglos from using the dodecahedron to destroy Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: With the TARDIS disabled, the Doctor is powerless to act when Romana is kidnapped.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to repair the TARDIS so that he can come to Romana's rescue.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana suspect that the Nimon are a small part of a large invasion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: On Crinoth, Romana discovers the truth behind the Nimon's empty promises.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana visit the Leisure Hive, a tourist attraction on the planet Argolis.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana track down the cause of the mysterious deaths at the Leisure Hive.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Tachyon Recreation Generator ages the Doctor into a white haired old man.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The obsessed Pangol is determined to give Argolis a future and strike back at the Foamasi.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Arriving on Earth, the Doctor, Harry and Sarah meet a group of stranded human colonists.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah has been captured by Styre who is conducting experiments on the captured humans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands on the old Dalek homeworld of Skaro.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Romana is captured and interrogated by the Daleks whilst the Doctor meets the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Davros has awoken from his centuries long slumber and is taken prisoner by the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that the Daleks need Davros to break the stalemate in their war with the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah finds a mysterious fossilized hand, which re-grows and begins to move.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The hand builds power and reacts to nuclear radiation, causing an overload situation.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The fossilized hand has regenerated into a Kastrian called Eldrad who appears to be female.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor, Sarah and Harry return to Nerva, but at an earlier point in time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Eldrad reconfigures his body to its male form and states he will return to Earth to rule.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah is the latest victim of the space plague.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Cybermen who are intent on destroying Voga.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Their plan to blow up Voga thwarted, the Cybermen intend to crash Nerva into the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana follow a distress signal to the jungle world of Chloris.
